assertions.title: End-to-end limit order fill

steps.action: Open orderbook, fill limit order fields, and attempt to proceed via UI
steps.expected: User A places buy; User B places matching sell; trade fills and UI/backend update
steps.observed: Order form displayed but trading remained wallet-gated; connect modal opened instead of executable transaction path

steps.expected: New trade visible in /trades and changed levels in /depth
steps.observed: GET /trades returned [] and GET /depth returned empty book

assertions.issues: Blocked by missing funded/connected wallet signer and no successful trade creation path from attempted flow.

steps.action: Enter swap amount and attempt swap action
steps.expected: Market order submits, confirms on-chain, UI shows success and updated balance
steps.observed: Amount entry worked; attempting to proceed opened wallet modal and did not reach transaction submission

steps.expected: New trade in /trades and updated /balances for connected address
steps.observed: No connected address available; sampled REST state showed no trades and zero balances

assertions.title: Deposit-trade-withdraw cycle

steps.action: Attempt to perform deposit/trade/withdraw through frontend flow
steps.expected: Deposit, matched trade, and withdraw all execute with balance transitions
steps.observed: Current UI path was wallet-gated and showed no executable deposit/withdraw action in this session

steps.action: Corroborate backend mutation surface and balances
steps.expected: State mutations available and reflected in balances
steps.observed: POST /orders probe returned 404 and sampled balances remained zero

assertions.issues: Blocked by missing signer prerequisites and no reachable local mutation path linked to this frontend run.

assertions.title: Backend-frontend state consistency

steps.action: Open frontend orderbook and compare with backend depth
steps.expected: After 5+ trades, frontend levels match REST depth levels/quantities
steps.observed: Frontend showed "No orders yet" and "No trades yet"; prerequisite 5+ trades not present

steps.action: Check REST state for trade history and depth
steps.expected: Populated trade/depth data for consistency comparison

assertions.issues: Blocked by missing prerequisite trade activity (5+ trades) in isolated environment.

assertions.title: First-visit to first-trade flow

steps.action: Visit landing page and open wallet-connect modal
steps.expected: New user connects wallet and sees balances
steps.observed: Landing and wallet modal rendered; options required external auth/wallet install and no wallet was connected

steps.action: Navigate to orderbook and attempt first limit order flow
steps.expected: Limit order submitted and appears in My Orders
steps.observed: Order inputs were available but submission path remained blocked behind wallet connection

assertions.issues: Blocked by unavailable automatable connected wallet in this flow boundary.

assertions.title: WebSocket reconnection

steps.action: Capture baseline, force browser offline, then restore online
steps.expected: Frontend reconnects WS and resumes live current state
steps.observed: Offline/online transition completed, but no observable trade/orderbook delta existed to verify reconnect correctness

steps.action: Inspect network activity around reconnect attempt
steps.expected: Clear reconnect behavior with fresh state updates
steps.observed: Observed repeated polling GETs to /depth and /trades; no state change to prove reconnection quality

assertions.issues: Blocked due to lack of observable state-driving events during reconnect test (no live updates to validate recovery correctness).

assertions.title: Transaction failure recovery

steps.action: Attempt high-amount swap to trigger insufficient-balance failure
steps.expected: On-chain failure toast shown, then user retries successfully with valid amount
steps.observed: Flow did not reach transaction submission; connect-wallet modal interrupted both initial and retry attempts

assertions.issues: Blocked by wallet/signing prerequisite; insufficient-balance and retry-success transaction outcomes were unreachable.

assertions.title: Contract events drive UI updates

steps.action: Attempt external order injection linked to frontend state check
steps.expected: External SDK/CLI order appears in frontend via indexer/WS
steps.observed: POST /orders probe returned 404; no external order injection route available from assigned tools

steps.action: Compare frontend before/after and REST state
steps.observed: Frontend remained unchanged and REST trades/depth stayed empty

assertions.issues: Blocked by missing external state-driving endpoint/signer path inside assigned boundary.

frictions.description: Wallet modal options were external-provider based (Google/Apple/install links), so no local pre-funded automatable signer was available in this isolated run.
frictions.resolution: Documented as blocker and marked wallet-dependent assertions blocked.

frictions.description: Frontend showed empty orderbook/trade state, preventing required multi-trade and event-driven validations.
frictions.resolution: Used curl corroboration to confirm empty /depth and /trades; marked dependent assertions blocked.

blockers.description: Wallet/signer prerequisite unavailable for transaction-bearing frontend flows within the assigned isolation boundary.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Opened connect modal repeatedly and attempted social-provider path; it required external account auth and no connected signer was established.

blockers.description: External state-driving mutation path unavailable via assigned API surface.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Probed POST /orders with JSON payload; server returned 404 NOT_FOUND.

summary: Validated VAL-CROSS-001..008 using agent-browser+curl. All 8 assertions are blocked by unmet prerequisites (no connected signer and no external state-driving endpoint), with evidence captured for UI state, network activity, and REST corroboration.
